vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup gshadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/gshadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/gshadow-

triage_decision.reason: Setting restrictive permissions on /etc/gshadow- backup file is a standard security practice that won't impact system operation
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Backup shadow file contains sensitive password hashes; File must remain protected from unauthorized access
